body.title: Migrate skill run scripts from CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS to UU_ROOT
body.result: savestate/run now derives CC_TOOLS from uu_root() with CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS as deprecated fallback; grep confirms no hardcoded paths remain
body.intention: I intend that no skill run script contains a hardcoded path or depends on CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS, making skills portable across machines.
body.description:
Update all skills/*/run scripts to use uu_root() from unseen_university._uu_root (or ${UU_ROOT} shell var) instead of CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS or hardcoded paths. Keep CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS as a shell alias (export CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS=${UU_ROOT}/lab/claudecode) in shell setup docs for one deprecation cycle — existing scripts that reference it continue to work.

**Affected files:** skills/savestate/run, skills/context-load/run, skills/sprint-ticket/run, skills/factory-create/run, skills/audit-feedback/run, skills/skills-sync/run (check each for CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS or hardcoded paths)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** skill run scripts only. Out of scope: lab/claudecode/*.py Python files (those already use os.environ); SKILL.md documentation files.
**Completion criteria:** grep -r CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS skills/*/run returns nothing; grep -r '/home/akien' skills/ returns nothing; python3 skills/savestate/run close 'test' works from any directory without CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS set.
